security.csp: default-src 'self' asset:; img-src 'self' asset: https: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.openai.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com
